summary: Executive user Peacock scheduled/live - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is an Executive user
AND there is a Peacock Game scheduled/in-progress

steps.action: WHEN the user views the Peacock game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN the Peacock pill is not displayed in the game tile
AND a lock icon is not displayed in the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header do not have a dark overlay
